name: rmp-functions-server
description: Servidor de funções RMP Group — substitui Edge Functions de alto volume

scripts.check-node: node -e "const v=process.versions.node.split('.')[0]; if(v!=='20'){console.error('❌ Node 20.x required, got '+process.versions.node); process.exit(1)} else {console.log('✅ Node '+process.versions.node)}"
